name: MCT User Settings Request
description: Request to change Modular Cooktops User Settings
comment: MCT User Settings Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: MCT Settings Actual
description: Actual Modular Cooktops User and System Settings
comment: MCT Settings Actual: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: MCT Current Event Record
description: Modular Cooktops Current Event Record (most recent)

values.13: Temperature Pin Short Cut to Neighbour
values.19: Over Temperature of Coil Sensor (Zone Error)
values.20: Over Temperature of Coil Sensor (Module Error)
values.132: Hold Probe Under Temp Limit Exceeded
values.133: Cook Probe Under Temp Limit Exceeded
values.134: Hold Probe Over Temp Limit Exceeded
values.135: Cook Probe Over Temp Limit Exceeded

comment: MCT Current Event Record: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: MCT System Market Code
description: Market Code for the Modular Cooktop System
comment: MCT System Market Code: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Global Timer Status
description: Status of the global timer
comment: Global Timer Status: Timer/duration value.

name: Hood Fan Speed
description: The current active fan speed. When writing, fan speed must be listed as available in available fan speed ERD 0x5B01.
comment: Hood Fan Speed: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Fan Speed Availability
description: The availability of fan speeds.
comment: Hood Fan Speed Availability: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Light Level
description: The current light setting. When writing, level must be listed as available in available light levels ERD 0x5B03. If 0x5B03 has "Infinite" set, then the Light Level is % with max 100.
comment: Hood Light Level: Enum writable select.

name: Hood Light Level Availability
description: The availability of light levels.
comment: Hood Light Level Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood Delay Off
description: This activates the Delay Off if the unit is On. It can also be used to cancel a pending delay off.
comment: Hood Delay Off: Enum writable select.

name: Hood Delay On
description: This activates the Delay On if the unit is Off. It can also be used to cancel a pending delay on.
comment: Hood Delay On: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood Heat Sensor Temperature
description: This indicates the heat sensor temperature on a vent hood.
comment: Hood Heat Sensor Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Hood Heat Sensor State
description: This indicates the heat sensor state on a vent hood.
comment: Hood Heat Sensor State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood Camera Light Assist Level
description: The current camera light assist setting. When writing, level must be listed as available in available light levels ERD 0x5B09. If 0x5B09 has "Infinite" set, then the Light Level is % with max 100.
comment: Hood Camera Light Assist Level: Enum writable select.

name: Hood Camera Light Assist Level Availability
description: The availability of the hood camera light assist levels.
comment: Hood Camera Light Assist Level Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood Display Protection Fan Speed
description: The current active hood display protection fan speed. When writing, fan speed must be listed as available in available fan speed ERD 0x5B0B.
comment: Hood Display Protection Fan Speed: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Display Protection Fan Speed Availability
description: The availability of fan speeds.
comment: Hood Display Protection Fan Speed Availability: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Notifications
description: Notifications from a hood.
comment: Hood Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood Notification Reset
description: Reset notifications set in 0x5B0C. Any time a 1 is written to these bits the associated notification is cleared. The host is expected to accept multiple writes with the same data.
comment: Hood Notification Reset: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Boost Duration
description: The length of time (in minutes) a Boost Fan will run. See ERD 0x5B00. See 0x5B10 for limits.
comment: Boost Duration: Single numeric writable value.

name: Delay Off Duration
description: The length of time (in minutes) a for delay off will run. See ERD 0x5B04 . See 0x5B11 for limits.
comment: Delay Off Duration: Single numeric writable value.

name: Boost Duration Limits
description: The acceptable limits (in minutes) for Boost Duration (see ERD 0x5B0E). Min must be less than max.
comment: Boost Duration Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Delay Off Duration Limits
description: The acceptable limits (in minutes) for Delay Off (see ERD 0x5B0F). Min must be less than max.
comment: Delay Off Duration Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood Request On/Off
description: This request turns the hood on to product-specific default light/fan settings. When turning the hood off, the product might save the previously used fan/light settings.
comment: Hood Request On/Off: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Hood Actual Fan Speed
description: Current Fan Speed (0 = OFF to X = Max Speed, inc. Boost, as in Available Fan Speeds (ERD 0x5B15))
comment: Hood Actual Fan Speed: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Requested Fan Speed
description: Requested Fan Speed (0 = OFF to X = Max Speed, inc. Boost, as in Available Fan Speeds (ERD 0x5B15))
comment: Hood Requested Fan Speed: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Available Fan Speeds
description: Available Fan Speeds (includes Available Boost Speeds as in ERD 0x5B16). Example: Normal Speeds = 3, Boost Speeds (ERD 0x5B16) = 2, Available Fan Speeds (ERD 0x5B15)= 5
comment: Hood Available Fan Speeds: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Hood Available Boost Speeds
description: Available Boost Speeds (0 = no boost available). Boost Speeds are included in Available Fan Speeds ERD 0x5B15
comment: Hood Available Boost Speeds: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Hood Actual Light Level
description: Current Light Level (0 = OFF to X = Max Light Level as in ERD 0x5B19)
comment: Hood Actual Light Level: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Hood Requested Light Level
description: Requested Light Level (0 = OFF to X = Max Light Level as in ERD 0x5B19)
comment: Hood Requested Light Level: Single numeric writable value.

name: Hood Available Light Levels
description: Available Light Levels (0 = hood has no light)
comment: Hood Available Light Levels: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Hood Actual Delay Off Mode
description: Indicates whether the hood is in Delay Off Mode
comment: Hood Actual Delay Off Mode: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Hood Delay Off Request
description: A request to start or stop the Delay Off Mode
comment: Hood Delay Off Request: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Hood Actual Delay Off Duration
description: The set duration of the Delay Off mode in minutes. See ERD 0x5B11 for limits.
comment: Hood Actual Delay Off Duration: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Hood Requested Delay Off Duration
description: Request to set a duration in minutes for the Delay Off mode. See ERD 0x5B11 for limits.
comment: Hood Requested Delay Off Duration: Single numeric writable value.

name: Hood to Cooktop Connection Status (Hood-Side)
description: Indicates the Status of the Hood to Cooktop (Chef Connect) Connection
comment: Hood to Cooktop Connection Status (Hood-Side): Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood Status
description: Status of the hood
comment: Hood Status: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood Model
description: Range Hood Model. First byte specifies Manufacturer/Model. Second byte specifies personality, if available/used.
comment: Hood Model: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood Actual Light Color
description: The currently set Light Color.
comment: Hood Actual Light Color: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood Requested Light Color
description: Request to set the Light Color.
comment: Hood Requested Light Color: Enum writable select.

name: Hood Available Light Colors
description: The Light Colors this hood supports
comment: Hood Available Light Colors: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Hood to Hob Actual Auto Control
description: Current State of Auto Fan Speed Control. Any change in speed not coming through ERD 0x5B26 will set this state to "Off".
comment: Hood to Hob Actual Auto Control: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Hood to Hob Request Auto Control
description: Request for Auto Control of fan speed. Auto Control of fan speed has to be done through ERD 0x5B26.
comment: Hood to Hob Request Auto Control: Enum writable select.

name: Hood Requested Auto Fan Speed
description: Requested Fan Speed (0 = OFF to X = Max Speed, inc. Boost, as in Available Fan Speeds (ERD 0x5B15)). Requests on this ERD are only processed when ERD 0x5B24/0x5B25 set to "Auto". This ERD is only to be used from a Hob (Auto Control).
comment: Hood Requested Auto Fan Speed: Speed/RPM sensor.

name: Relative Humidity Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The reported update period of the sensed relative humidity ERD, while idle. The device can report more often than this number of minutes if something interesting is occurring (e.g. the fan is on). The value of this is determined from 0x5B28.
comment: Relative Humidity Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Requested Relative Humidity Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes
description: The requested update period of the sensed relative humidity ERD, while idle. The fastest requested period should be 1 minute.
comment: Requested Relative Humidity Sensor Idle Update Period in Minutes: Humidity percentage sensor.

name: Request Update of Relative Humidity (%)
description:
Used to request an update to the device relative humidity ERD.
 - After being written to the device value will change its value to "No Request"(0).
 - If the device receives the request then the value of 0x5B2A will be updated
comment: Request Update of Relative Humidity (%): Humidity percentage sensor.
